root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no) as member_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as group_name ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.keeping_status /*สถานะเรียกเก็บ*/ ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status /*สถานะงด*/ from sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no
